steps.title: Undo division by 38
steps.content: The equation is $$\frac{r}{38}=s+t$$ To isolate $r$, multiply both sides by $38$.

steps.title: Solve for r
steps.content: $$r=38(s+t)$$ Keep $s+t$ in parentheses because the $38$ multiplies the entire right side.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $r=38(s+t)$, so it is correct. Choices A and B add or subtract $38$, and choice D divides by $38$ again instead of undoing the division.
